bonuses.leadin: This last of Fuentes’s major novels borrows its structure from Tristram Shandy. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this novel in which Angel and Angeles scheme to have a child born at exactly midnight of October 12, 1992, in order to win a government prize for the five hundred year anniversary of the discovery of the Americas.
In a Fuentes story, this type of reclining statue popular among several Mesoamerican peoples turns into flesh, becomes animate, and kills the man who purchased it.
